title: MChaos
description: A reddit community comes together to add random blocks, items, mobs and more, all random and unrelated to each other.
body:
# Basic Introduction

In a series of Reddit posts on r/MCreator, I asked the MCreator community to give me ideas for an MCreator mod, and I would add everything into the mod. This mod, MChaos, is that mod. A mod where everyone's ideas is in one, single, chaotic place, MCreator.

# What is MChaos?

MChaos is not going to be a single mod with a single premice, it is going to be a project, I full well plan this to be one of if not the biggest project I ever made. The first update, MChaos 1, will be mobs that the community requested, and I decided to add. The second one, MChaos 2, will be blocks. The third one will be items, etc.

# How can I put my suggestion in?

Pretty simple! Just go to the MCreator subreddit, and look for a post relating to MChaos. I will tell you that I am planning to make this a bimonthly thing, meaning 6 times a year. So, every two months, check if there is a new post to give suggestions on.\

# How am I supposed to play this mess?

Simple, the gameplay of MChaos is supposed to be a challenge, as in, can you survive in a world where many people suggested different things to try to stop you? The point of MChaos, whilst not being majorly about gameplay, is also a little bit of how the gameplay is after everything that the people add.

![MChaos official logo.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8af5548b602e3216609acc792359caa05678b922.png)
